title: Notifications - Master Toggle OFF - Update successful
scenario: No notification shown on successful firmware update when Notifications master toggle is OFF in App Settings > General > Notifications & Device Alerts
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
2. Go to App Settings > General > Notifications & Device Alerts.
3. Turn the Notifications master toggle OFF.
4. Pair the Poly Bluetooth audio device with the app.
5. Navigate to Device Settings > Software Update.
7. Put the app in the background (e.g., press the Home button or switch to another app).
8. Wait for the firmware update to complete.
expected: No notification is shown upon successful firmware update completion.
